case_title: MICHELE G MAGNO VS. JANIE M. VARGAS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED OCT-06-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, JANIE M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAGNO, MICHELE G RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGAS, JANIE M. $2,333.02 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,418.02, THE COURT FINDS THE DAMAGES PROVEN REASONABLY, ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT TO BE $2333.02 AND THAT PLAINTIFF WAS NOT AT FAULT.
